name: Marlin (SS-205)
events: 21 Mar 1942 USS Marlin departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
22 Mar 1942 USS Marlin arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
17 Apr 1942 USS Marlin departed Casco Bay, Maine for New London, Connecticut.
6 Jan 1943 USS Marlin departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
7 Jan 1943 USS Marlin arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
19 Feb 1943 USS Marlin departed New London, Connecticut for the Portsmouth Navy Yard.
20 Feb 1943 USS Marlin arrived at the Portsmouth Navy Yard from New London, Connecticut for a refit.
22 May 1943 With her refit completed, USS Marlin, departed the Portsmouth Navy Yard for New London, Connecticut.
23 May 1943 USS Marlin arrived at New London, Connecticut from the Portsmouth Navy Yard.
6 Dec 1944 USS Marlin arrived at New London, Connecticut from the Portsmouth Navy Yard.
29 May 1945 USS Marlin departed New London, Connecticut for Casco Bay, Maine.
30 May 1945 USS Marlin arrived at Casco Bay, Maine from New London, Connecticut.
